visual_description: The scene opens with a view through a large, arched doorway into a vast, dimly lit hall filled with swirling dust and debris. A young man with dark hair and round glasses, wearing a brown jacket over a blue shirt, stands in the foreground, looking forward with a surprised expression. The camera then cuts to a wide shot from behind, showing him standing alone in the center of the hall, facing a massive, dark stone wall.
audio_description: A dramatic, swelling orchestral score plays, creating a tense and epic atmosphere.
